testcase.name: Add element and verify delete button

failure.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created from unknown error: no chrome binary at /usr/bin/google-chrome Build info: version: '4.0.0', revision: '3a21814679' System info: host: 'codespaces-49cf94', ip: '127.0.0.1', os.name: 'Linux', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '6.8.0-1044-azure', java.version: '25.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--headless, --no-sandbox], binary: /usr/bin/google-chrome, extensions: []}}], desiredCapabilities=Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--headless, --no-sandbox], binary: /usr/bin/google-chrome, extensions: []}}}]

testcase.failure:
